rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Apeman Cameras
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/16
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '218.53.203.117'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*apemans.com*'
            - '*system.ini*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 218.53.203.117 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Apeman_Cameras"; sid:1080026; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 218.53.203.117 any (msg:"CDB APEX Apeman_Cameras"; sid:2413842; rev:1;)
